# tenableio_policy (Resource)

Manages a scan policy (template) in Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the policy.
- `template_uuid` (String) The UUID of the base scan template for this policy.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the policy.
- `visibility` (String) The visibility of the policy: shared or private.

### Read-Only

- `creation_date` (Number) Unix timestamp when the policy was created.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier for the policy.
- `last_modification_date` (Number) Unix timestamp when the policy was last modified.
- `owner` (String) The owner of the policy.
- `owner_id` (Number) The ID of the policy owner.
